'''Mesan''' was the wife of [[Jaret]], the nephew of the [[King/Legends|King]] [[Meenon]] of [[Senali]]. She had one child, [[Tawn]]. She welcomed [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] when they visited Senali.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
